popularStory.headline: Edward Frost
popularStory.description:
Edward Frost was
 He left a will on 26 July 1616 at Stanstead, Co of Suffolk, which was proved 4 Oct 1616 at the Prerogative Court of Canterbury. The will names wife Thomasine; son
 William; daughte …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Frost於1560年3月13日之前出生在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親John Frost20歲，母親Ann Scott23歲。他於大約1583年與Mary Hurd在英國結婚。他去世於1616年8月3日在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦斯亞德，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Frost于1560年3月13日之前出生在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，他的父亲John Frost20岁，母亲Ann Scott23岁。他于大约1583年与Mary Hurd在英国结婚。他去世于1616年8月3日在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦斯亞德，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Frost was born before 13 March 1560, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, his father, John Frost, was 20 and his mother, Ann Scott, was 23. He married Mary Hurd about 1583, in England. He died on 3 August 1616, in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Frost est né avant 13 mars 1560, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Frost, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Scott, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mary Hurd environ 1583, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 août 1616, à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Frost vor 13. März 1560 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Frost 20 und seine Mutter Ann Scott 23. Er hat um 1583 in England Mary Hurd geheiratet. Er starb am 3. August 1616 in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Frost è nato il prima del 13 marzo 1560 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Frost, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ann Scott, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mary Hurd circa 1583, nel England. Morì il 3 agosto 1616, nel Stanstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Stanstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Frostが1560年3月13日以前にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父John Frostは20歳，母Ann Scottは23歳であった。約1583年にイギリスでMary Hurdと結婚した。彼は1616年8月3日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスタンステアドで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクスタンステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Frost(이)가 1560년 3월 13일 이전 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Frost(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Scott(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1583년 영국에서 Mary Hurd(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1616년 8월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠스테아드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.before 13 March 1560–3 August 1616: antes 13 de março de 1560–3 de agosto de 1616
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Frost nasceu antes 13 de março de 1560, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Frost, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ann Scott, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hurd aproximadamente 1583, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1616, em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Frost родился перед 13 марта 1560 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Frost было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Scott, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hurd около 1583 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 3 августа 1616 г. в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
